title: make vendor
body:
This regenerates vendor (and, apparently, go.mod and go.sum) to fix
compilation broken by a recently merged PR https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27946
(see https://github.com/containers/podman/pull/27946#issuecomment-3894028029).

Generated by:

> $ make vendor
> go mod tidy
> go mod vendor
> go mod verify
> all modules verified
> go mod edit -toolchain none
> $ git add vendor

using

> $ go version
> go version go1.25.7 X:nodwarf5 linux/amd64

PS it's weird that there is no job to check vendor is valid.

comments.body: [NON-BLOCKING] Packit jobs failed. @containers/packit-build please check. Everyone else, feel free to ignore.
OK there's something going on I can't understand here.
